findings.product_constraints_only: LVR declared on product constraints[] but not on lendingRates[] — primary fix target (Phase 2)
findings.no_lvr_signal: No LVR in rate fields, product constraints, or parseable text — remains after all phases
findings.text_lvr_not_parsed: LVR wording present but regex/keyword rules did not extract a bound
findings.rate_has_bounds_but_unspecified: Should be zero when tier_for_boundary is consistent
